design_artifacts.purpose: Feature specification with user stories, FR-001 through FR-012 requirements, success criteria, and assumptions
USWDS typography setting research with decisions D1 through D10 for font mapping, type scale, line-height, font weights, CSS custom property strategy, and @font-face strategy
sections: Decision D1: Brand Typeface to USWDS Font Role Mapping
Decision D2: Custom Typeface Token Configuration
Decision D3: PathAble Type Scale to USWDS System Token Mapping
Decision D6: CSS Custom Property Duplication Strategy
Decision D9: Body Typography and Prose Settings

design_artifacts.purpose: Formal entity definitions for BrandTypeface, FontFamilyToken, RoleFontToken, TypeScaleMapping, FontWeightMapping, LineHeightMapping, TypographyCustomProperty
sections: Entities: BrandTypeface, FontFamilyToken, RoleFontToken, TypeScaleMapping, FontWeightMapping, LineHeightMapping, TypographyCustomProperty

design_artifacts.purpose: SCSS interface contract defining public API, internal module interfaces, build contract, consumption contract, and dual naming convention
Usage guide with installation, CSS and SCSS examples, font self-hosting instructions, and verification commands
Implementation plan with technical context, constitution check, project structure, complexity tracking, and research/design phases

Implementation tasks broken into phases: Foundational (T001-T004), US1 body typography (T005-T006), US2 type scale (T007-T009), US3 dual CSS props (T010-T011), US4 upgrade docs (T012), Polish (T013-T015)

source_files.purpose: Existing USWDS theme color configuration file - MUST be extended with typography overrides. Single source of truth for @use 'uswds-core' with (...) block.
Existing PathAble typography variables and CSS custom properties. MUST be updated with dual --pathable-font-*/--usa-font-* @each loop.
Package entrypoint. MUST be updated to forward _fonts.scss before _uswds-theme.scss.
sections: Order: fonts, uswds-theme, colors, typography, spacing, elevation, radius, semantic

source_files.purpose: Agent instructions for PathAble styles. MUST be updated with USWDS typography token usage rules.
sections: USWDS Token Usage (existing - color only, needs typography expansion)

source_files.purpose: Brand rules document. MUST be updated with USWDS typography token mapping table.
sections: USWDS System Token Mapping (existing - color only)

font_files.description: Font files referenced by @font-face rules in _fonts.scss. Not required for build (build completes without font files), but fonts won't load at runtime without them.
font_files.missing_aspect: Font files are not yet committed to the repository. @font-face rules will compile successfully but font files must be placed at packages/styles/fonts/<font-name>/*.woff2 before runtime rendering.

research.md.D2: Use $theme-typeface-tokens with custom display-name, cap-height (364px), and stack for each brand font
research.md.D6: Use SCSS @each loop over $typography-tokens map to emit both --pathable-* and --usa-* CSS custom properties
research.md.D7: Add typography settings directly into existing _uswds-theme.scss (single @use ... with block)
research.md.D8: Create _fonts.scss with manual @font-face rules (not USWDS custom-src system)
